ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "visiting_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in-progress, final) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the game started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the game ended */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_id" TEXT /* ID of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "visiting_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the visiting team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visiting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visiting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseball team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team's uniform */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team's captain */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side (right, left, switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing side (right, left) */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_biography" TEXT /* Short biography of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract ends */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles hit by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples hit by the player */,
  "sac_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts by the player */,
  "sac_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies by the player */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases hit by the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage of the player */,
  "strikeouts_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "walks_issued" INTEGER /* Number of walks issued by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "hit_batters" INTEGER /* Number of batters hit by pitches thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "balks" INTEGER /* Number of balks committed by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "pitches_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "strikes_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of strikes thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "balls_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of balls thrown by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "outs_recorded" INTEGER /* Total number of outs recorded by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  "left_on_base" INTEGER /* Number of runners left on base by the player (if a pitcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
